last_episode_to_air.name: Decision Time
last_episode_to_air.overview: Chloe throws a housewarming, but is she warming to the idea of a baby? Amber finally has somewhere to live, Sassi's series ends with a splash. Mia has a huge decision to make.

name: Teen Mom UK
overview: We’ve followed the girls on their journey and now it’s time to see these five teen moms in the UK prove that age really is just a number when it comes to parenting. We’ll watch the tears, tantrums and independence of these incredible young women as they share their journey, showcasing the highs and lows of becoming a teen mom.

episodes.name: Meet the Mums!
episodes.overview: Meet five feisty Brit girls as they juggle babies, boyfriends, careers and broken hearts.

episodes.name: Decisions Decisions
episodes.overview: Mia has her baby, Megan makes a decision and Amber and Ste argue about the christening.

episodes.name: Horses For Courses
episodes.overview: Dylan buys Megan a horse and Naomi and Raphael's love life hits a rocky patch.

episodes.name: Trouble And Paradise
episodes.overview: Chloe turns 18 but rows with Jordan on her big night out.

episodes.name: Outfits, Arguments And Ultimatums
episodes.overview: Chloe and Jordan go to Spain, but love stays at home. Amber rows with Ste.

episodes.name: It's All Over
episodes.overview: There's more drama in store for the teen mums as Mia faces off with Erin.

episodes.name: The Future's Bright
episodes.overview: Mia has a first night out since Marliya was born and Chloe makes a decision about Jordan.

episodes.name: New Beginnings
episodes.overview: While Megan drops a baby bombshell on Dylan, Naomi moves on from Raphael.

episodes.name: A New Arrival
episodes.overview: Chloe, Mia, Megan and Amber are being joined by a sassy newcomer.

episodes.name: Relationship Woes
episodes.overview: Sassi chooses a surprising new career, while Chloe clashes with her mum.

episodes.name: Be My Valentine
episodes.overview: Amber, Chloe and Mia have very different Valentine's Day experiences.

episodes.name: Home Sweet Home
episodes.overview: Megan prepares for her big day, and Amber's love life is in tatters.

episodes.name: Labour And Love
episodes.overview: Megan has a baby, Amber has a meltdown, and romance is in the air for Mia.

episodes.name: Lads' Trip
episodes.overview: Megan welcomes a new addition to the family... a horse!

episodes.name: Making Memories
episodes.overview: Amber helps Ste celebrate a big day, and Chloe remembers what it's like being a teenager.

episodes.name: Now or Never
episodes.overview: As Sassi boards a plane, Mia jumps out of one.

episodes.name: Make or Break
episodes.overview: Welcome to the world Teen Mom UK series 3. Join our favourite five feisty Brit teen mums for access all areas into their worlds of toddlers, tiffs, tapas and tough love!?

episodes.name: The Ex Factor
episodes.overview: Fireworks tonight as Amber decides she loves Ste, Erin stays the night at Manley’s, Sassi hates single life, Megan tries to fix her family feud and Chloe and Jordan argue about nursery.

episodes.name: Enough is Enough
episodes.overview: It’s all kicking off as Chloe loses it with Jordan, Sassi breaks down over Darren, Amber’s confession backfires, Megan’s in a bad place and Mia has something to say to Manley’s mum.

episodes.name: Emotions and Explosions
episodes.overview: Chloe and Jordan’s house move gets even more stressful as the couple argue about the not-so-fun job of packing, while Amber goes all out to patch things up with Ste

episodes.name: New Direction
episodes.overview: Things are emotional on this week’s episode as Megan opens up to her mum about her anxiety, whilst Sassi faces a serious disaster during a driving lesson. Meanwhile, Amber tries to sort her relationship with Ste once and for all…

episodes.name: Happy Ever After
episodes.overview: Big changes all round. A new home for Chloe and Jordan, new love interests for Mia and Sassi, a change of plans for Megan, and Amber awaits some life changing news.

episodes.name: Let's Party
episodes.overview: It’s paaarty time! Sassi plans a big birthday bash, Chloe pays the price of partying, the party’s over for Mia and Amber and Megan’s family get together, but they’re not in the party mood…

episodes.name: Stand By Your Man
episodes.overview: Chloe and Jordan throw their first party, Mia and Amber make a fresh start, Megan suspects Dylan is hiding something and Sassi goes all out to win back her man!

episodes.name: End of an Era
episodes.overview: Emotions run high for Amber, Chloe has a Mother's Day from hell, Sassi and Darren try and repair their relationship while Dylan's friendship with another girl has tipped Megan over the edge

episodes.name: Seeing Red
episodes.overview: Sassi attends an anger management course. Ste hits a low point as he upsets both Amber and Kirsty. Shannon decides to rekindle an old romance and Chloe and Jordan welcome a new addition.

episodes.name: Puppy Love
episodes.overview: Sassi tries to stay calm on a romantic getaway. Amber gives Ste the cold shoulder. Sleep-deprived Chloe questions if getting a puppy was a good idea. Shannon resits her GCSEs but gets bogged down with tantrums rather than textbooks.

episodes.name: This Girl Can
episodes.overview: Sassi is a woman on a mission as she starts her new job. Shannon heads to the seaside where Charlie’s wandering eye threatens to derail their family holiday. Ste lays his heart on the line.

episodes.name: A New Normal
episodes.overview: Sassi moves into her dream home with Darren, Amber meets a new man, Chloe and Jordan try to freshen up their relationship, while a stressed out Shannon is desperate for time on her own.

episodes.name: Daddy Day Care
episodes.overview: Shannon and Charlie come to blows in Spain while Amber’s flying high in Benidorm. Sassi is missing home, and Chloe’s relationship reaches breaking point.

episodes.name: Leap of Faith
episodes.overview: Jordan gives Chloe the birthday surprise of her life! Shannon and Charlie decide to split. Sassi connects to her faith and gets a lot off her chest. Amber’s birthday ends in tears.

episodes.name: Shock and Surprise
episodes.overview: Chloe and Jordan get romantic in the city of love, while Amber and Ste have a serious conversation about what the future holds for them. Meanwhile, Shannon faces a serious pregnancy scare.

episodes.name: Starting Over
episodes.overview: Megan returns and swallows her pride by going on a day out with Dylan and his new girlfriend. Sassi and Darren split. Shannon gets her GCSE results. Chloe lands a job where Jordan works.

episodes.name: Love and Loss
episodes.overview: Amber comes clean to Ste about her new man. Jordan's behaviour goes from bad to worse. Shannon snoops through Charlie's phone. Devastating news brings Dylan and Megan together.

episodes.name: New Experiences
episodes.overview: Mia makes a surprise return! Chloe rebels, Sassi struggles back at home and Megan faces her feelings. Shannon and Charlie go house-hunting while Amber sleeps on the streets.

episodes.name: Sun, Sea, Tears and Fear
episodes.overview: Amber jets off on holiday, it's even more bad news for Sassi as she loses her job. Shannon hits a wall and Megan feels lonelier than ever. Chloe forces Jordan to be romantic.

episodes.name: Man Trouble
episodes.overview: Emotions run high for Megan as Dylan goes AWOL. Sassi gets big news. Amber throws an engagement party to remember. And it's super-sad times for Chloe as Jordan gets a diagnosis.

episodes.name: Tearful Breakthrough
episodes.overview: Charlie struggles to accept Shannon's pregnancy, while Megan can't step away from Dylan. Ste stays over at Amber's and Chloe and Jordan make a tearful breakthrough.

episodes.name: All change
episodes.overview: The reality documentary following the lives of young mothers relocates from America to the UK, following five feisty British girls through the trials of parenthood.

episodes.name: Stress and strain
episodes.overview: Jordan tells Chloe he isn't sure he wants to be with her. Megan organises a party and learns you can't please everyone. Amber feels overwhelmed. Sassi feels the love.

episodes.name: Episode 3
episodes.overview: Amber and Ste's weekend away doesn't go to plan. Chloe lets rip about Jordan's lads holiday. Megan regrets rejecting a thoughtful gesture from Dylan's girlfriend.

episodes.name: Face Off
episodes.overview: Ste can't hold his tongue at Brooklyn's party. Chloe grills Jordan about his lads trip. Megan summons Dylan's girlfriend for a chat. Sassi has her braces off.

episodes.name: Kick Start Careers
episodes.overview: The reality documentary following the lives of young mothers relocates from America to the UK, following five feisty British girls through the trials of parenthood.

episodes.name: Staying Positive
episodes.overview: Chloe and Jordan are living their best lives on holiday in Corfu. Shannon asks Charlie to move in. Sassi goes through with the big operation and Amber tries to stay positive

episodes.name: Staying Positive
episodes.overview: Sassi and Darren watch Zena'ya take to the catwalk. Shannon plans a family photoshoot but Charlie doesn't go. Chloe chops off Marley's hair for charity. Amber hits an all time low

episodes.name: Big News
episodes.overview: Shannon and Charlie fit in a holiday to Margate. Chloe and Jordan push themselves to the limit. Megan enjoys time with Dylan and his girlfriend. Amber throws a gender reveal party

episodes.name: Highs & Lows
episodes.overview: The Teen Moms are back, and Mia returns to the cast. Sassi is heartbroken that Zenaya prefers staying with her dad. Mia tries to build bridges with Manley. Lockdown leaves Amber feeling depressed. Chloe resists Jordan's suggestion of Baby no. 2

episodes.name: Tiffs, Tantrums & Talking from the Heart
episodes.overview: Sassi and Darren come to blows on a weekend away, Amber and Ste are hoping they get answers from Brooklyn's assessment & Mia and Manley have an overdue heart to heart.

episodes.name: Back with a Bang
episodes.overview: The Mums are back. Mia is in a rollercoaster new relationship while Sassi deals with heartbreak and loneliness. Amber struggles with a Threenager, while Chloe spies her dream home.

episodes.name: Man Trouble
episodes.overview: It all kicks off between Sassi and Darren. Mia's relationship is on its last legs. Amber and Ste bury the hatchet. Chloe's feeling the pressure to have a baby, because Jordan is broody.

episodes.name: Life And Death
episodes.overview: A near death experience leaves Amber and the boys homeless. Parents evening causes strife for Sassi and Darren. Chloe and Jordan's world falls apart.

episodes.name: Rock Bottom
episodes.overview: Mia's dad gets some big news about his cancer. Chloe and Jordan come to terms with the death of a friend. Ambers homeless, and life is chaos is for the boys.

episodes.name: Turning Points
episodes.overview: Mia makes a life changing decision. Sassi steps out of her comfort zone at a spiritual retreat. Chloe's worried about Jordan. Amber and Beth reach breaking point.

episodes.name: Moving On
episodes.overview: Mia's devastated to discover arguing with Manley is affecting Marliya, Chloe and Jordan say goodbye to their first home, Amber takes back control of her life, Sassi welcomes a new family member.

episodes.name: Showdown
episodes.overview: It's time for Chloe's big stressful move, Ambers still homeless, but she's got an adventure planned. Sassi makes a breakthrough with Darren. Mia and Manley tell each other how they really feel.

episodes.name: Decision Time
episodes.overview: Chloe throws a housewarming, but is she warming to the idea of a baby? Amber finally has somewhere to live, Sassi's series ends with a splash. Mia has a huge decision to make.
